name: counterintel
description: Detects misinformation patterns, coordinated narratives, and adversarial influence in the signal corpus. Three independent detectors: narrative similarity clustering (TF-IDF cosine), bot-pattern repetition (near-duplicate hashing), and campaign fingerprinting (source coordination scoring). Results stored in signal_flags table. Only analyses CRIME_INTEL and PRIORITY stream signals — FIRMS, USGS, GDACS excluded by design.
author: FORGE-OS
